series.title: Peter Pan Disney Hörspiel

albums.title: Peter Pan & Wendy (Hörspiel zum Disney Real-Kinofilm)
Peter Pan 2 - Neue Abenteuer in Nimmer Land (Hörspiel zum Disney Film)

series.curator_notes: This series contains three Disney film Hörspiele: the classic 1953 animated film (2023 Hörspiel release), the 2002 sequel 'Return to Never Land' (Peter Pan 2), and the 2023 live-action remake 'Peter Pan & Wendy'. Each album is a complete audiobook adaptation of the respective film. For a related TV series, see artist ID 6KtoLRDglLoZUgfbAB1idL which contains 'Jake and the Never Land Pirates' episodes and classic book audiobooks - these are curated separately.

review.notes: Auto-approved: no gaps or duplicates found.

verification.concerns: All three albums are German-language Disney audiobooks based on their respective films. Episode 1 is the 1953 animated classic, Episode 2 is "Return to Neverland" (2002), and Episode 3 is the 2023 live-action remake. The tracks are chapters named appropriately. All from official Disney labels (Walt Disney Records, Disney Storytellers). No issues found.
